resources.string: Manage your space crew, upgrade their skills, craft powerful gadgets, and complete dangerous missions to save the galaxy.

• SOLDIER: High attack power; specializes in Combat missions.
• PILOT: Expert navigator; increased evasion skills.
• MEDIC: Heals wounded crew members in the Hospital and during missions.
• SCIENTIST: Essential for crafting powerful gadgets in the Workshop.
• ENGINEER: Maintains equipment and provides bonus repair speed.

• QUARTERS: View your crew and overall stats.
• LUNARIS: Recruit new crew members (Cost: 100 coins per Level).
• TRAINING: Level up your crew to increase their base stats.
• WORKSHOP: Assign Scientists to craft gadgets like Medicine, Rifles, and Armour.
• HOSPITAL: Assign Medics to heal injured crew members.
• MISSION: Send your crew on missions. Beware: threats can attack multiple targets at once!

• ATTACKS: Threats retaliate by hitting a random number of targets in a random order.\n• GADGETS: Use gadgets during your turn! Using a gadget doesn\'t end your turn, allowing you to follow up with an attack or heal.\n• BALANCING: Rifles (+8 Attack) and Armour (+5 Defense) are vital for surviving the Dragon Boss fight.
